completion_promise: termsAcceptance.accept mutation persists immutable audit row to local test DB (migration applied). termsAcceptance.getAcceptance query returns correct accepted/acceptedAt shape. TermsAcceptanceConfirm component renders for authenticated users and hides after acceptance. All 3 test suites pass. All 4 typechecks pass. Migration applied to intelliflow-postgres-test:5433. Full evidence committed.

domain_tests.detail: 9/9 tests pass — TermsAcceptance.create, fromRecord, toRecord, zero-infra-deps, getters

api_router_tests.detail: 17 tests pass — idempotency, IP extraction (incl. malformed-XFF guard), input isolation, cross-tenant, immutability, procedure type, server-side userAgent, sanitizeIp null case

api_legal_regression.detail: All 18 existing legal test files pass after adding terms-acceptance router

web_component_tests.detail: 14 tests pass — auth-gating, accepted-hide, mutation call, cache invalidation on success, error state, a11y attributes

migration_applied.evidence: All migrations have been successfully applied.

prisma_client_regenerated.detail: Generated Prisma Client (7.8.0) to generated/prisma — 183 shim files

pii_guard.detail: grep confirmed ipAddress/userAgent appear only in prisma.create block in router — no logger or OTel span calls
pii_guard.evidence: Line 47 (assignment), lines 62-63 (create block only). No logger.info or setAttribute calls.

immutability.detail: upsert update:{} empty block confirmed. No update/delete procedures exported from router.
immutability.evidence: API test: 'does not export update, delete, or remove procedures' PASS

cross_tenant_isolation.detail: API test: cross-tenant negative probe — tenantId-B ctx gets accepted:false for user who accepted under tenantId-A
cross_tenant_isolation.evidence: findFirst call confirmed to use TENANT_B tenantId from session, not userId alone
